ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "athlete_name" TEXT /* Full name of the athlete */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade of the athlete */,
  "school" TEXT /* Name of the school the athlete attends */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the athlete */,
  "athlete_email" TEXT /* Email address of the athlete */,
  "parent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the athlete's parent */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the athlete */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the athlete's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "school" TEXT /* Name of the school the team belongs to */,
  "team_email" TEXT /* Email address of the team */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., track, field) */,
  "distance" INTEGER /* Distance of the event */,
  "relay" INTEGER /* Whether the event is a relay or not */,
  "relay_position" TEXT /* Position of the event in a relay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meets" (
  "meet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meet */,
  "meet_name" TEXT /* Name of the meet */,
  "meet_date" TEXT /* Date of the meet */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the meet */,
  "meet_url" TEXT /* URL of the meet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete who performed */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event performed */,
  "meet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meet where the performance occurred */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time achieved by the athlete */,
  "grade" INTEGER /* Grade of the athlete at the time of performance */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the athlete in the event */,
  "relay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relay the performance belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_meet_id FOREIGN KEY ("meet_id") REFERENCES meets ("meet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event participant */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete participating in the event */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "meet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meet where the event occurred */,
  "entry_time" TEXT /* Time entered by the athlete for the event */,
  "entry_rank" INTEGER /* Rank entered by the athlete for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_meet_id FOREIGN KEY ("meet_id") REFERENCES meets ("meet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event result */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "meet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meet where the event occurred */,
  "result_time" TEXT /* Time achieved in the event */,
  "result_rank" INTEGER /* Rank achieved in the event */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete who achieved the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_meet_id FOREIGN KEY ("meet_id") REFERENCES meets ("meet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_results_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relays" (
  "relay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relay */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "meet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meet where the relay occurred */,
  "relay_time" TEXT /* Time achieved by the relay */,
  "relay_rank" INTEGER /* Rank achieved by the relay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relays_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relays_meet_id FOREIGN KEY ("meet_id") REFERENCES meets ("meet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relay_legs" (
  "leg_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relay leg */,
  "relay_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relay */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete who ran the leg */,
  "leg_time" TEXT /* Time achieved by the athlete in the leg */,
  "leg_rank" INTEGER /* Rank achieved by the athlete in the leg */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leg_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relay_legs_relay_id FOREIGN KEY ("relay_id") REFERENCES relays ("relay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relay_legs_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meet_administrators" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meet administrator */,
  "meet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meet the administrator is responsible for */,
  "admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the meet administrator */,
  "admin_email" TEXT /* Email address of the meet administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meet_administrators_meet_id FOREIGN KEY ("meet_id") REFERENCES meets ("meet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., athlete, coach, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user's record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "coach_email" TEXT /* Email address of the coach */,
  "school" TEXT /* Name of the school the coach belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id")
)
